proposition: The 2023 media report that 'Marek Kříž (Point FM) took ~5 % of Able.cz for 4M CZK at an 80M CZK valuation' aligns in person, timing and approximate size with 5326G s.r.o.'s register entry (Kříž-majority vehicle, in from 28 Aug 2023) — but Point FM and 5326G are distinct legal entities and no public source states that 5326G executed that specific investment.
shortTitle: The 2023 media report that 'Marek Kříž (Point FM) took ~5 % of…
statusExplanation: Analytické čtení citované evidence, nikoli přímo doložený fakt.
note: The article was re-fetched and hash-preserved 2026-07-18 (it names Point FM, Kříž, the 80M valuation and a five-percent stake); an attempt to corroborate via Point FM's own site failed (JS-rendered page, no readable content — see provider runs).

sources.title: ARES — official REST API, basic + full public-register (VR) records for all 19 in-scope entities, preserved and hashed
CzechCrunch (2023-12-20) — Able.cz investment coverage: Point FM / Marek Kříž ~5% at 80M CZK valuation
